categories.name: Agent-Native Identity & IAM
categories.description: Platforms built specifically for AI agent identity lifecycle, registration, delegated access, and runtime enforcement

tools.name: Okta (Auth for AI Agents)
tools.description: Treats AI agents as first-class identities with strict authentication, authorization, and governance. Leader in Gartner Magic Quadrant for Access Management.

tools.name: Auth0 (AI Agent Auth)
tools.description: Supports dedicated AI agent identities, persistent user memory, async authorization. Secures MCP servers with control over which agents connect and what they access.

tools.name: Strata Maverics
tools.description: Agentic Identity platform addressing gaps in legacy IAM architectures for AI agents. Argues agents need their own identity class, not just NHI treatment.

tools.name: Ping Identity (Identity for AI)
tools.description: Launched Identity for AI platform for managing AI agents from registration and delegated access to runtime enforcement.

tools.name: Cisco (Identity Intelligence + Duo for Agents)
tools.description: Extends Zero Trust to agents with agent discovery in Identity Intelligence, agentic IAM in Duo, and MCP policy enforcement.

tools.name: Microsoft Agent 365
tools.description: Control plane for agents giving IT, security, and business teams visibility to observe, secure, and govern agents at scale. GA May 2026.

categories.name: Non-Human Identity (NHI) Security
categories.description: Platforms focused on discovering, classifying, and securing all non-human identities including AI agents, service accounts, API keys

tools.name: Entro Security
tools.description: First platform to unify security for AI agents, NHIs, and secrets. Full visibility, ownership attribution, real-time anomaly detection.

tools.name: Astrix Security
tools.description: Secures agent identities with governance, least-privilege access, and full audit trails.

tools.name: Clutch Security
tools.description: Universal NHI security platform that discovers, governs, and secures every NHI across environments.

tools.name: OASIS Security
tools.description: Secures AI agents and NHIs across IaaS, SaaS, PaaS, and on-prem environments.

tools.name: GitGuardian (NHI Governance)
tools.description: Secrets security and NHI governance. ML-powered scanning across SDLC for 350+ secret types. Expanding into NHI governance.

categories.name: Agentic AI Security & Governance
categories.description: Platforms for comprehensive agent security: discovery, behavior monitoring, guardrails, and governance

tools.name: Zenity
tools.description: Connects signals across agent ecosystem for unified, intent-aware view of activity and risk. Knows which agents exist, who owns them, what they access.

tools.name: Teleport
tools.description: Infrastructure Identity Platform unifying governance of human, machine, workload, device, and AI identities.

tools.name: Lakera
tools.description: LLM attack surface management. Blocks prompt injection, data leaks, tool-abuse. $20M Series A.

tools.name: Obsidian Security
tools.description: Security for AI agents, protecting intelligent systems in enterprise environments.

categories.name: Workload Identity & Secretless Access
categories.description: Platforms providing cryptographic identity for workloads and secretless authentication

tools.name: Aembit
tools.description: IAM for agentic AI and workloads. Secretless access and real-time policy enforcement across any environment.

tools.name: SPIFFE/SPIRE
tools.description: Open-source framework for cryptographic workload identity. Zero-trust identity issuance without secrets. CNCF graduated project.

tools.name: Teleport (Workload Identity)
tools.description: Infrastructure access platform with workload identity capabilities for zero-trust access.

categories.name: Secrets Management & Vaults
categories.description: Centralized platforms for storing, rotating, and managing secrets, credentials, and keys

tools.name: HashiCorp Vault
tools.description: Industry-standard secrets management with dynamic secrets, leasing. Developer-friendly, cloud-agnostic. 6.8% mindshare.

tools.name: CyberArk
tools.description: Enterprise PAM leader. Session recording, Central Policy Manager, Enterprise Password Vault.

tools.name: Akeyless
tools.description: Cloud-native SaaS vaultless secrets management and modern PAM. Reduces traditional vault complexity.

tools.name: Doppler
tools.description: Developer-friendly secrets management. Centralizes API keys and env variables, syncs to apps and infrastructure. From $3/user/month.

tools.name: Infisical
tools.description: Open-source secrets management. Cloud and self-hosted. Secrets vault + config sharing + code scanning.

tools.name: AWS Secrets Manager
tools.description: Managed solution for securely storing and rotating API keys, database credentials, and other secrets.

tools.name: 1Password (Agentic AI)
tools.description: TOTP support for AI agents, enabling MFA-compliant access without human intervention.

categories.name: Fine-Grained Authorization (FGA)
categories.description: Authorization-as-a-service platforms for complex permission models (RBAC, ABAC, ReBAC)

tools.name: Oso
tools.description: Developer-first authorization framework with Polar policy language. Supports RBAC, ABAC, ReBAC. Now focused on agent security.

tools.name: WorkOS FGA
tools.description: Enterprise authorization platform for B2B SaaS. Fine-grained authorization beyond traditional RBAC.

tools.name: Permit.io
tools.description: Authorization platform built on OPA with visual UI, real-time updates, audit logs.

tools.name: Cerbos
tools.description: Open-source fine-grained access control. YAML-based policy definitions. Application-focused design patterns.

tools.name: OpenFGA (Auth0)
tools.description: Open-source fine-grained authorization engine inspired by Google Zanzibar.

categories.name: Agent Integration & Third-Party Auth
categories.description: Platforms enabling AI agents to authenticate with and use third-party services

tools.name: Composio
tools.description: AI-first, MCP-native integration platform. 500+ pre-built tools with managed auth, tracing, logging.

tools.name: Nango
tools.description: Unified API platform connecting 250+ SaaS apps. User-delegated OAuth flows, secure token storage and refresh.

tools.name: Stytch
tools.description: Agent-to-agent OAuth for secure AI agent connectivity with MCP.

categories.name: Identity Governance & Administration (IGA)
categories.description: Platforms for identity lifecycle management, access reviews, compliance

tools.name: SailPoint
tools.description: Leading IGA platform. Identity lifecycle management, access certifications, compliance.

tools.name: Saviynt
tools.description: AI-powered identity security. Unified platform for human and non-human identities. SaviAI for intelligent workflows.

tools.name: ConductorOne
tools.description: AI-native identity governance. Autonomous agents for managing requests and reviews. Single platform for human and NHI.

tools.name: Veza
tools.description: Identity security platform with Authorization Graph. Maps identities to effective permissions. Access AuthZ automation.

categories.name: MCP & Protocol-Level Security
categories.description: Tools and standards for securing the Model Context Protocol and agent-to-tool communication

tools.name: Cloudflare Agents (MCP Auth)
tools.description: OAuth 2.1 authorization for MCP servers built on Cloudflare Workers. Built-in auth flow.

tools.name: MCP Gateway Registry
tools.description: Enterprise-ready MCP Gateway with OAuth auth, dynamic tool discovery, Keycloak/Entra integration. Open source.

tools.name: Gravitee (Agent Management)
tools.description: AI Agent Management Platform for API governance extending to agent-to-tool communication.

categories.name: API Key Management
categories.description: Platforms for creating, rotating, and revoking API keys

tools.name: Unkey
tools.description: API key management with one-way hashed keys, audit logs, rate limiting. Developer-focused.

tools.name: Zuplo
tools.description: API management with built-in key management, instant key rolling without downtime. Free tier available.

key_trends: AI agents being treated as first-class identities alongside humans and machines
Emergence of Agent Management Platform (AMP) as a new Gartner category
MCP OAuth 2.1 becoming the standard for agent-to-tool authentication
Secretless access and just-in-time credentials replacing static secrets
Convergence of NHI security and agentic AI security into unified platforms
Fine-grained authorization (FGA) replacing RBAC for agent permissions
Major enterprise vendors (Okta, Microsoft, Cisco) adding agent-specific features
3000x growth projected for agent management platforms by 2029
